title: elaeocarpus stipularis var. rejangensis
intro: Elaeocarpus stipularis var. rejangensis is a plant species belonging to the Elaeocarpaceae family, commonly known as the blue berry ash or mountain blueberry tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Elaeocarpus stipularis var. rejangensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, among others. Elaeocarpus stipularis var. rejangensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
